history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, messy hair is looking down, partially obscured by his own shadow. He's wearing a dark navy blue crewneck sweatshirt and dark wash, slightly baggy jeans. He's leaning against a wall with his left leg bent and resting on something unseen, while his right leg is extended.

The background is divided into two distinct sections. To the left, a wall is covered in small, square, mosaic tiles in varying shades of brown and gold, giving a textured, almost shimmering effect. A dark brown wooden frame surrounds this tiled section. To the right, the wall is a plain, textured beige or light cream color, with a subtle vertical pattern.

The lighting appears to be artificial and somewhat dim, casting soft shadows. The light source on the left seems to be reflecting off the mosaic tiles, creating highlights. The overall mood is contemplative, perhaps a bit moody or introspective, due to the man's pose and the subdued lighting. The color palette is dominated by browns, blues, and beige. The style is realistic, capturing a candid moment.
